query: SELECT id, name, phone, role FROM users WHERE role IN ('super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario') AND phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' ORDER BY FIELD(role, 'super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario'), name LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT id, name, phone, role FROM users WHERE role IN ('super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario') AND phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' ORDER BY FIELD(role, 'super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario'), name LIMIT 10;
